text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Tch... This number again. Don't tell me they got
lost for the hundredth time.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Ugh, stop your crying—I can't understand
a word. Uh huh... And where are you? ...Excuse
me? The river?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, you should see the traffic light? ...Yes. Turn
right there. Yes. Haha... Right? You see the
freestyle racetrack now?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They call whenever they damn well please. The nerve.
